3121010.name: Code My Robot Vacuum
3121010.description:
Code My Robot Vacuum is a playful coding game where you teach a robot vacuum how to clean! Write code-like commands, optimize routines, and overcome messy challenges filled with pets, socks, and obstacles.

  • Write code to guide your vacuum

  • Solve cleaning puzzles with multiple solutions

  • Sandbox mode for creative experiments

  • Optional challenge settings for extra difficulty

  • Replayability with achievements and optimization goals

Gameplay

Code My Robot Vacuum is inspired by classics like Human Resource Machine and The Farmer Was Replaced, but with a fun household twist. Each room is a puzzle, and you must write simple commands to help your robot clean efficiently. Avoid bumping into furniture, dodge pets, and find clever paths through chaos. You can brute-force your way through, or optimize your solution for the fewest steps.

Every level has extra goals for replayability — like collecting dust bunnies in the least moves possible, or avoiding bumping into a single wall.

Story

You’ve just unboxed your brand-new smart vacuum — but it’s not so smart. To unlock its full potential, you must program its every move. The more you teach it, the more capable it becomes. Will you build the perfect cleaning routine, or watch your robot get stuck on walls and furniture forever?

In this game, mistakes are ok 👍 (they’re just part of debugging!)
3121010.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
